name: World's Hardest Game
description: Test your skills in this challenging game, navigating through obstacles and traps to reach the goal.

name: World's Hardest Game 2
description: Continue the challenge with new levels and obstacles in the sequel to the World's Hardest Game.

name: X Trial Racing
description: X Trail Racing is a fun and challenging motorbike racing game.

name: Yoshi's Fabrication Station
description: Help Yoshi create unique and colorful patterns in this creative and engaging game.

name: You Are Jeff Bezos
description: Experience the life of Jeff Bezos, making decisions and managing wealth in this interactive game.

name: Zombs Royale
description: Battle against other players in a fast-paced battle royale game, collecting weapons and surviving to be the last one standing.

name: circlO
description: Guide the ball through rotating circles, avoiding obstacles and collecting points in this challenging game.

name: n-gon
description: Navigate through geometric obstacles, testing your reflexes and precision in this minimalist game.

name: xx142-b2exe
description: Embark on a mysterious journey, solving puzzles and uncovering secrets in this unique game.
